source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/01_HAD1717MC, MG/03_설계개발 출력/02_CCL 및 승인원/승인원/기구/환경자료/동인산업/H&Abyz MSDS& 시험성적서/무전해니켈/NiPRO 1000 B.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: NiPRO 1000 B 무전해니켈 도금용 약품의 물질안전보건자료로 유해성, 구성성분, 취급·저장, 운송 및 법적 규제 정보를 제공한다.
sourceSummary.officialUse: 무전해니켈 도금용 약품 취급 시 산업안전보건, 유해화학물질 관리, 운송, 폐기 및 보호구 요구사항 확인에 사용된다.
keyPoints: 제품의 권고 용도는 무전해니켈 도금용 약품이다.
유해성·위험성 분류는 피부 부식성/자극성 구분 1, 심한 눈 손상성/눈 자극성 구분 1, 특정표적장기 독성 1회 노출 구분 1이다.
주요 구성성분은 Sodium hydroxide 4.3%, Sodium hypophosphite 50%, WATER 45.7%이다.
UN 번호는 1823이며 적정선적명은 SODIUM HYDROXIDE SOLUTION, 운송 위험성 등급은 8, 용기등급은 III이다.

evidence.claim: NiPRO 1000 B is identified as the product name.
The recommended use of NiPRO 1000 B is as an electroless nickel plating chemical.
evidence.evidenceText: 제품의 권고 용도 무전해니켈 도금용 약품

evidence.claim: The product is classified as skin corrosion/irritation category 1.
The product is classified as serious eye damage/eye irritation category 1.
evidence.evidenceText: 심한 눈 손상성 눈 자극성 구분 / : 1
evidence.pageTarget: Serious Eye Damage and Eye Irritation Category 1

evidence.claim: The product is classified as specific target organ toxicity, single exposure, category 1.
evidence.pageTarget: Specific Target Organ Toxicity Single Exposure Category 1

evidence.claim: Hazard statements include H290, H302, H315, H317, H318, and H412.
evidence.evidenceText: 금속을 부식시킬 수 있음 H290 . 삼키면 유해함 H302 피부에 자극을 일으킴 H315 . 알레르기성 피부 반응을 일으킬 수 있음 H317 . 눈에 심한 손상을 일으킴 H318 . 장기적인 영향에 의해 수생생물에게 유해함 H412 .

evidence.claim: The composition lists Sodium hydroxide 4.3%, Sodium hypophosphite 50%, and water 45.7%.
evidence.evidenceText: Sodium hydroxide 수산화나트륨 1310-73-2 4.3 Sodium hypophosphite 차아인산나트륨 7681-53-0 50 WATER 순수 7732-18-5 45.7

evidence.claim: The product physical state is liquid and its color is colorless transparent.
evidence.pageTarget: NiPRO 1000 B Physical and Chemical Properties
NiPRO 1000 B Physical and Chemical Properties
NiPRO 1000 B Physical and Chemical Properties

evidence.claim: The proper shipping name is SODIUM HYDROXIDE SOLUTION.
evidence.evidenceText: 적정선적명 . SODIUM HYDROXIDE SOLUTION (Less than toxic value, < 5% )

evidence.claim: The transport hazard class is 8 and the packing group is III.
evidence.evidenceText: 운송에서의 위험성 등급 . 8 라 용기등급 . III

evidence.claim: Under the Industrial Safety and Health Act, the product is regulated as a workplace monitoring substance, controlled substance, and exposure-limit substance.
evidence.evidenceText: 산업안전보건법에 의한 규제 . 작업환경측정물질 측정주기 개월 ( : 6 ) 관리대상물질 노출기준설정물질
evidence.pageTarget: Korea Occupational Safety and Health Act Chemical Regulation

evidence.claim: Under the Waste Management Act, the product is regulated as designated waste.
The SDS was first prepared on 2013-04-15.
The SDS final revision date is 2018-04-01 and the revision count is 4.

reviewFlags.reason: Source text appears OCR-derived with repeated headings and spacing artifacts, but key regulatory fields remain readable.
Manufacturer name is OCR-rendered as '주 써켐', which likely indicates a corporate marker, but the exact legal company name is not fully normalized in the source.
No separate publication date is stated; documentDate uses the explicitly stated final revision date.
ProductSignal metadata mentions HAD/A/F 1417-1717, but the source text itself only identifies NiPRO 1000 B as the product name.
